payload.objective: Measure Nangate45 PPA for the row-8 bf16 reciprocal-normalization datapath with the reciprocal LUT memory-size gate enabled, so the decoder q8-vs-bf16 normalization frontier can replace the remaining bf16 heuristic gap.
